findings.issue: server.js readJson lacks explicit JSON parse error handling, risking 500s on malformed payloads.
findings.fix: Wrap JSON.parse in try/catch, return 400 with {error:'invalid_json'} before outer handler.

findings.issue: app.js relies on innerHTML string concatenation for dynamic UI, risking XSS if escapeHtml misses edge cases.
findings.fix: Adopt document.createElement or DOMPurify for detail panel rendering to guarantee safe DOM insertion.

findings.issue: ingest.js addCustomApp mixes sync loadApps with async refreshApps fallback, risking race conditions on concurrent calls.
findings.fix: Convert loadApps to async or implement a mutex/queue to serialize state mutations during refresh.

suggested_next_steps: Integrate OpenRouter fanout for automated review theme extraction
Add Qlty and Promptfoo gates to CI pipeline
Implement live-smoke mode with actual Apify tokens and rate limiting
Add response caching and pagination for /api/apps endpoint
